tooltips.documentBuilderDesignTemplatesPermission: Allows creating and editing Document Builder template drafts.
tooltips.documentBuilderPublishTemplatesPermissio: Allows publishing immutable Document Builder template versions.
tooltips.documentBuilderGenerateDocumentsPermissi: Allows previewing and generating individual documents, subject to normal record and field access.
tooltips.documentBuilderGenerateBatchesPermission: Allows starting batch document generation, subject to normal access for every source record.
tooltips.documentBuilderUseSpreadsheetImportsPerm: Allows creating and using temporary spreadsheet imports.
tooltips.documentBuilderManageSharedMediaPermissi: Allows creating, updating, and deleting shared Document Builder media.
tooltips.documentBuilderViewDataSnapshotsPermissi: Allows viewing stored resolved-data snapshots when the generated document is also readable.
tooltips.documentBuilderDeleteGeneratedDocumentsP: Allows deleting generated documents that are otherwise accessible.
tooltips.documentBuilderConfigurePermission: Allows changing Document Builder settings and operational limits.
